props.title: Embed Workflow Automation Into Your .NET App
props.description: A drag & drop designer and a simple API — everything you need to build, run, and manage business processes inside your application.

image.alt: Workflow Engine HTML5 drag & drop designer

props.subtitle: Use cases
props.title: Built for Real Business Scenarios
props.text:
From simple approvals to long-running orchestrations —
Workflow Engine by Optimajet handles the full spectrum of business process automation.

features.title: Approval Workflow
features.text: Business processes where someone needs to sign off at a specific stage. An approval workflow is a sequence of tasks that routes data through human decisions — approvals, rejections, or escalations.
features.benefit: Cut approval cycles from days to hours. Replace email chains and status-check meetings with automated routing that notifies the right person at the right time.
features.details: Automates any process involving manager or executive decisions: purchase order approvals, contract reviews, document sign-offs, budget authorizations, and employee onboarding steps.

features.title: Data Processing
features.text: Sequential or parallel operations on data, files, and documents. Every step is traceable, auditable, and visible in the workflow designer.
features.benefit: Build data pipelines visually — and modify them in minutes, not sprints. See the entire processing flow at a glance instead of digging through code.
features.details: Executes actions on triggers or events. Processes incoming data from external systems and IoT devices. Handles file operations (create, read, write, move, delete) and HTTP calls (POST/GET requests).

features.title: Long-Running Process
features.text: Persistent workflows that can run for hours, days, or months. The workflow sends a request to an external system, saves its state, and waits — picking up exactly where it left off when a response arrives.
features.benefit: Run thousands of concurrent long-lived processes without worrying about state loss. Processes survive server restarts, support horizontal scaling, and are fail-safe by design.
features.details: Automates any process that involves waiting for external responses or actions: order fulfillment tracking, multi-stage onboarding, SLA-based escalations, recurring timer-based jobs, and never-ending monitoring workflows.

testimonials.text: The workflow is super flexible, visual and easy to extend, allowing us to customize it to our needs in a timely fashion.
testimonials.name: Márcio Lima
testimonials.title: Senior Software Engineer

props.title:
Why Teams Choose
Workflow Engine by Optimajet
props.description: A complete toolkit for building, running, and managing business workflows inside your .NET applications.

features.title: Visual Drag & Drop Designer
features.text: Design and edit workflows in the browser — no IDE required. Business users can modify process schemes without touching code.

features.title: No-Code Scheme Editing
features.text: Built-in elements like Activity, Transition, Action, Actor, Command, and Timer let non-developers build and adjust process flows on their own.

features.title: Live Process Updates
features.text: Update running workflows without downtime. Choose whether active processes continue on the old scheme or migrate to the new one automatically.

features.title: Parallel Branching
features.text: Split workflows into concurrent branches that execute tasks in parallel — then merge results back into a single flow.

features.title: Portable Workflows
features.text: Export and import workflow schemes as XML. Share configurations across projects, environments, or teams.

features.title: Multi-Language UI
features.text: Ship the designer interface in any language. Built-in localization support for global teams and international products.

props.title: Which Product Do I Need?
props.description: Two ways to run Workflow Engine by Optimajet, depending on your stack and project stage.

products.title: Workflow Engine
products.description: An embedded component designed to be fully integrated into your .NET or .NET Core project.
products.whyChoose: If you already have a .NET information system

products.title: Workflow Server
products.description: A stand-alone cross-platform application with an admin panel and integration API.
products.whyChoose: If you need a standalone cross-platform solution
